content:
I am Ming Liu, currently pursuing my studies at the School of Biological Science and Medical Engineering, Southeast University.
My core interest lies at the intersection of Biomedical Engineering and Artificial Intelligence. I am passionate about leveraging deep learning algorithms and advanced computational tools to solve complex challenges in medical imaging and analysis.
Education # 2021 - Present B.S. / M.S. in Biomedical Engineering, Southeast University Get in Touch #I am always open to academic discussions, technical exchanges, and collaboration. Feel free to reach out via email or connect with me on GitHub.
title: About

Selected Projects
Graduation Project: Advanced Image Segmentation Algorithms Focusing on the implementation and optimization of deep learning models for high-accuracy medical image processing.
title: Publications

content:
Modern medical imaging generates massive amounts of complex data. My research focuses on developing robust computational approaches to extract meaningful clinical insights from these modalities, bridging the gap between raw data and actionable medical knowledge.
Current Directions #Deep Learning for Medical Image Segmentation #Accurate segmentation of medical images is a fundamental step in automated diagnosis and quantitative analysis. I apply state-of-the-art deep learning architectures to improve the precision, efficiency, and robustness of segmenting anatomical structures and anomalies.
AI-Powered Workflows in BME #Beyond pure algorithmic design, I am intensely interested in integrating cutting-edge AI technologies and large language models into biomedical research pipelines. By optimizing these computational frameworks, I aim to accelerate data processing and enhance the overall efficiency of biomedical engineering workflows.
title: Research
